# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

public function searchProducts(Request $request)
{
    $searchQuery = DB::table('products')
        ->select(
            'products.*',
            DB::raw('(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE orders.product_id = products.id) as order_count'),
            DB::raw('(SELECT SUM(price) FROM orders WHERE orders.product_id = products.id) as total_sales')
        );

    if ($request->has('name')) {
        $searchQuery->where('products.name', 'like', '%' . $request->input('name') . '%');
    }

    if ($request->has('category')) {
        $searchQuery->where('products.category_id', '=', $request->input('category'));
    }

    if ($request->has('min_price') && $request->has('max_price')) {
        $searchQuery->whereBetween('products.price', [$request->input('min_price'), $request->input('max_price')]);
    }

    $searchQuery = $searchQuery->paginate(10);

    return response()->json($searchQuery);
}
